flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Radford University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (38.8% → 33.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Radford University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (49.6% vs 55.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Radford University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Radford University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (66.7% → 75.6%).
